testcase.name: test_10_create_member_for_inscricao
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agenda_module.py:162: in test_10_create_member_for_inscricao assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create member failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create member failed: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","status"],"msg":"Input should be 'visitor', 'new_convert', 'member' or 'leader'","input":"active","ctx":{"expected":"'visitor', 'new_convert', 'member' or 'leader'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/enum"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_11_create_inscricao_free_event
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agenda_module.py:171: in test_11_create_inscricao_free_event assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create inscricao failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create inscricao failed: {"detail":"membro_id obrigatório"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_12_duplicate_inscricao_rejected

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'inscrito' in 'membro_id obrigatório' + where 'membro_id obrigatório' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd89b09f5a10>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd89b09f5a10> = 'membro_id obrigatório'.lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agenda_module.py:183: in test_12_duplicate_inscricao_rejected assert "inscrito" in response.json()["detail"].lower() E AssertionError: assert 'inscrito' in 'membro_id obrigatório' E + where 'membro_id obrigatório' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd89b09f5a10>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd89b09f5a10> = 'membro_id obrigatório'.lower

testcase.name: test_13_list_inscricoes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agenda_module.py:193: in test_13_list_inscricoes assert len(data) >= 1 E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_14_create_inscricao_paid_event_pending
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agenda_module.py:207: in test_14_create_inscricao_paid_event_pending assert member_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_15_confirm_payment_inscricao

failure.message: AttributeError: type object 'TestAgendaModule' has no attribute 'paid_inscricao_id'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agenda_module.py:221: in test_15_confirm_payment_inscricao f"{BASE_URL}/api/church/events/{TestAgendaModule.test_paid_event_id}/inscricoes/{TestAgendaModule.paid_inscricao_id}/confirmar-pagamento", ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: type object 'TestAgendaModule' has no attribute 'paid_inscricao_id'

testcase.name: test_16_cancel_inscricao
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agenda_module.py:235: in test_16_cancel_inscricao assert response.status_code == 200, f"Cancel inscricao failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Cancel inscricao failed: {"detail":"Inscrição não encontrada"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
